Title: Relates to the zero emissions vehicle and clean burning fuel vehicle rebate program
Summary: Doubles the existing rebates available from the zero emissions vehicle and clean burning fuel vehicle rebate program.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend part AA of chapter 58 of the laws of 2016, relating to establishing a zero emissions vehicle and clean burning fuel vehicle rebate program, in relation to the zero emissions vehicle and clean burning fuel vehicle rebate program
